nasb.text: The wisdom of the sensible is to understand his way, But the foolishness of fools is deceit.

esv.text: The wisdom of the prudent is to discern his way, but the folly of fools is deceiving.

cnv.text: 精明人的智慧能分辨自己的道路； 愚昧人的愚妄卻欺騙自己。

ccb.text: 明哲凭智慧辨道， 愚人被愚昧欺骗。

csbs.text: 聪明人的智慧，使他领悟自己的道路； 愚昧人的愚妄，却是自欺。
